level.setting: The Molten Spire of Ignis, a crumbling obsidian fortress suspended above a river of magma.

encounters.hazard: Periodic eruptions of sulfurous gas that deal 5 damage per second

pickup.name: Essence of Glacial Flow
pickup.effect: Permanently cools magma surfaces allowing safe traversal and weakens fire-based armor

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Sentinel shatters the gate to the Inner Sanctum.

encounters.hazard: Unstable rock platforms that collapse into magma

pickup.name: Core of the Tectonic Heart
pickup.effect: Allows the user to solidify molten matter into physical structures

encounters.trigger: The Stalker's death unlocks the sealed elevator to the Summit.

encounters.hazard: Meteor rain that deals massive splash damage

pickup.name: Sun-Forged Catalyst
pickup.effect: Amplifies geomantic abilities against divine entities

encounters.trigger: The Pyromancer signals the true guardian to awaken from the crater.

boss.name: Ignis, the World-Eater
boss.victory_condition: Channel the Catalyst to transmute the boss into solid basalt, then shatter him.

level.objective: Suppress the volcanic eruption threatening the mortal realm by killing its avatar.
level.reward: Control over the tectonic plates of the region.

level.setting: The Magma Forge, a crumbling industrial temple built inside an active caldera

pickup.name: Frost Vial
pickup.effect: Freezes enemies in place

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Golem causes the bridge to collapse, sliding the player into the Smelting Chamber.

pickup.name: Obsidian Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the Inner Sanctum gates

encounters.trigger: Opening the ash vent unlocks the path to the Core Tunnel.

pickup.name: Cryo-Core
pickup.effect: Extreme freezing agent

encounters.trigger: The Knight drops the Core, and the massive blast doors to the Heart of the Mountain open.

boss.name: Volcanic Overlord
boss.victory_condition: Stabilize the volcano by cooling the Overlord's core

level.objective: Shut down the geothermal engine before the temple explodes
level.reward: Title of 'Ashen Savior' and unlimited fire mana

level.setting: The Magma Spire, a crumbling fortress suspended over an active volcanic crater

pickup.name: Frost-Infused Oil
pickup.effect: Coats weapon for extra cold damage

encounters.trigger: Defeating the sentinel unlocks the gate to the Inner Sanctum.

pickup.name: Sacred Incense
pickup.effect: Provides a shield against extreme heat

encounters.trigger: The Golem's collapse reveals a secret path to the Altar of Ash.

pickup.name: Heart of the Mountain Crystal
pickup.effect: Stabilizes volcanic energy

encounters.trigger: The Warlock's defeat shatters the barrier protecting the Boss.

boss.name: Igniar, the Core Tyrant
boss.victory_condition: Use the crystal to neutralize his core, then strike the final blow with the Greatsword.

level.objective: Extinguish the volcanic fire before it consumes the surrounding valley.
level.reward: The Paladin's armor is permanently imbued with fire resistance.

level.setting: The Molten Expanse, a crumbling obsidian landscape fractured by rivers of magma and suffocating ash clouds.

pickup.name: Cryo-Resin Vial
pickup.effect: Temporarily coats the weapon in freezing agents

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Stalker causes the ridge to collapse, revealing the entrance to the Ashen Catacombs.

encounters.hazard: Choking ash storms that obscure vision

pickup.name: Molten Core Shard
pickup.effect: Grants immunity to extreme heat

encounters.trigger: Shattering the Golem's core triggers a seismic shift, opening the sealed gate to the Crater Heart.

pickup.name: Volcanic Catalyst
pickup.effect: Amplifies damage against hardened crusts

encounters.trigger: The death of the Sentinel extinguishes the lava barrier guarding the Inner Sanctum.

boss.name: Ignis the World-Burner
boss.victory_condition: Strike the boss's exposed heart while it is destabilized by the catalyst's reaction.

level.objective: Extinguish the eternal forge powering the volcanic eruption before it consumes the surrounding valley.
level.reward: The Ember-Hearted Greataxe, a legendary weapon forged from the boss's remains.

level.setting: The Smoldering Archives, an ancient obsidian library located inside an active volcano.

enemy.name: Obsidian Golem
enemy.weakness: Kinetic impact from the Clockwork Kinetic Gauntlet

pickup.name: Frost-Infused Gear
pickup.effect: Temporarily chills metal surfaces, making them brittle

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Golem unlocks the heavy stone door leading to the Magma Library

enemy.name: Ember Sprite
enemy.weakness: The Frost-Infused Gear slows down their flight speed

encounters.hazard: Rising heat waves that obscure vision

pickup.name: Conductive Copper Coil
pickup.effect: Can be attached to weapons to channel electrical shocks

encounters.trigger: Killing the Sprite allows the player to retrieve the Obsidian Key required for the boss chamber

enemy.name: Molten Sentry
enemy.weakness: Electrical surges from the Conductive Copper Coil

encounters.hazard: Fissures in the floor venting noxious gas

pickup.name: Volcanic Stabilizer Fluid
pickup.effect: Rapidly cools heated objects, freezing them in place

encounters.trigger: The Sentry's destruction shuts down the geothermal shields protecting the Inner Sanctum

boss.name: Ignis, The Core Warden
boss.victory_condition: Apply the Volcanic Stabilizer Fluid to his core to solidify his molten form

level.objective: Retrieve the lost Chronos Scroll hidden in the heart of the volcano.
level.reward: The Master Artificer's Blueprint and a permanent 10% movement speed increase.

pickup.name: Frozen Core Shard
pickup.effect: Temporarily grants chill damage to attacks

encounters.trigger: Defeating the golem triggers an earthquake that reveals the lower lava cavern

encounters.hazard: Cracks in the floor venting magma

pickup.name: Ancient Conductive Rod
pickup.effect: Increases lightning strike frequency

encounters.trigger: Extracting the wraith's essence opens the sealed Obsidian Gate

pickup.name: Volcanic Heartstone
pickup.effect: Stabilizes energy levels for the final confrontation

encounters.trigger: The Stalker's collapse triggers the activation of the central caldera altar

boss.name: Ignis the Storm-Eater
boss.victory_condition: Overload the altar with the Heartstone then land the finishing strike

level.objective: Deactivate the volcanic spire to stop the unnatural storm
level.reward: Mastery of the Storm-Eater's flame-lightning fusion technique

level.setting: The Molten Marshmallow Volcano, a bubbly, bubbling landscape of glowing lava-taffy and floating pumice islands.

enemy.name: Grumpy Ember-Bunny
enemy.weakness: The high-pitched frequency of the Training Whistle

encounters.hazard: Slippery sugar-lava patches that slow movement

pickup.name: Frozen Mint Leaf
pickup.effect: Cools down hot lava surfaces, allowing safe passage

encounters.trigger: Defeating the bunny scares a flock of Lava-Ducks, revealing the path to the Boiling Brook.

enemy.name: Steam-Cloud Tortoise
enemy.weakness: The Frozen Mint Leaf, which creates a calming mist

pickup.name: Shiny Pebble of Cooling
pickup.effect: Extinguishes small flame-based projectiles

encounters.trigger: The Tortoise retreats into its shell, dropping a key to the Magma Throne Room.

enemy.name: Pouty Magma-Pony
enemy.weakness: The Shiny Pebble of Cooling, which douses its fiery mane

pickup.name: Golden Carrot
pickup.effect: Required to soothe the final boss

encounters.trigger: The pony gallops away in embarrassment, opening the main gate to the Boss chamber.

boss.name: Ignis the Grumpy Volcano Spirit
boss.weakness: The Golden Carrot, which distracts him for a nap
boss.victory_condition: Feed the boss the Golden Carrot to put him to sleep, stopping the eruption.

level.objective: Soothe the volcanic spirit so the local sugar-marshmallow villagers can have their annual picnic in peace.
level.reward: The title of 'Beastmaster of the Molten Marshmallow' and an unlimited supply of S'mores.

level.setting: The Obsidian Spire atop the Dormant Peak of Aethelgard

pickup.name: Chronos Sand Vial
pickup.effect: Temporarily freezes enemy movement

encounters.trigger: Defeating the spirit unlocks the bridge to the Caldera Rim

pickup.name: Temporal Shard
pickup.effect: Increases spell casting speed

encounters.trigger: Clearing the construct collapses the path to the Inner Sanctum

pickup.name: Void Core
pickup.effect: Essential to weaken the boss

encounters.trigger: Retrieving the core opens the final chamber door

boss.name: Ignis, Warden of Time
boss.victory_condition: Seal the volcanic rift using the Void Core before Ignis restores his health

level.objective: Ascend the spire to seal the unstable rift connecting the volcano to the temporal stream

pickup.name: Sun-Kissed Vial
pickup.effect: Grants temporary shield against void damage

encounters.trigger: Defeating the wraith reveals a hidden path to the Star-Gate Plaza

pickup.name: Crystalline Shard of Dawn
pickup.effect: Infuses weapons with blinding light

encounters.trigger: The sentinel drops a keystone required to unlock the Celestial Sanctum

pickup.name: Aura of Zenith
pickup.effect: Increases damage against shadows by 50%

encounters.trigger: The guardian's defeat breaks the seal on the Inner Sanctuary

boss.name: Archon of the Void
boss.victory_condition: Purify the Archon's core using the empowered radiant strike

level.objective: Restore light to the Floating Gardens of Aethelgard

level.setting: An infinite astral library floating in the void between dimensions

pickup.name: Aether Lens
pickup.effect: Reveals invisible pathways and hidden enemy vulnerabilities

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Sentinel activates the ancient lift to the Star Chamber

encounters.hazard: Temporal freezing zones that slow movement

pickup.name: Celestial Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the mechanism holding the boss gate

encounters.trigger: Using the Aether Lens to find the Void Observer's core triggers the release of the boss gateway

pickup.name: Cosmic Fragment
pickup.effect: Temporarily freezes boss movement

encounters.trigger: The death of the Wraith aligns the celestial gates, summoning the final entity

boss.name: Aurelius the Timekeeper
boss.victory_condition: Reduce boss health to zero while affected by the Cosmic Fragment

level.objective: Retrieve the Chronos Core to restore temporal balance

pickup.name: Void Essence Vials
pickup.effect: Coats the blade in corruption damage

encounters.trigger: Opening the gate to the Moonlit Sanctum

pickup.name: Sun-Touched Shard
pickup.effect: Blinds celestial entities upon contact

encounters.trigger: Clearing the path to the Solar Spire

pickup.name: Heart of the Cosmos
pickup.effect: Massive damage against divine bosses

encounters.trigger: Activating the final altar leading to the throne room

boss.name: Celestial Overlord
boss.victory_condition: Channeling the Heart into the Overlord's core

level.objective: Sever the link between the Astral Spire and the mortal realm

pickup.name: Moonlight Prism
pickup.effect: Refracts light to create blinding flashes

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Cloud Sprite clears the path to the Comet Gardens.

pickup.name: Star-Dust Potion
pickup.effect: Grants temporary invulnerability

encounters.trigger: Opening the treasure chest reveals the entrance to the Astral Observatory.

encounters.hazard: Telescope lenses projecting dangerous laser beams

pickup.name: Supernova Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the Cosmic Throne Room

encounters.trigger: Capturing the Void Moth unlocks the door to the final boss.

boss.name: Nebula King
boss.victory_condition: Use the Supernova Key to destabilize the King's form

level.objective: Restore light to the floating islands by dethroning the grumpy Nebula King.
level.reward: The title of Arch-Illusionist and a permanent pet constellation

level.setting: A crumbling nebula temple floating in a thunderstorm of shattered timelines

pickup.name: Bottled Lightning
pickup.effect: Increases damage against electric-conductive entities

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Sentinel cracks the gate seal, allowing entry into the Core Chamber

pickup.name: Chronos Shard
pickup.effect: Slows time around the wielder, making them impervious to rapid attacks

encounters.trigger: Absorbing the Wraith's energy triggers the awakening of the Grand Celestial Engine

pickup.name: Starheart Core
pickup.effect: Stabilizes unstable celestial energy

encounters.trigger: The Herald's demise causes the engine to overload, summoning the Celestial Titan boss

boss.name: Celestial Titan
boss.victory_condition: Implant the Starheart Core into the Titan's chest plate

level.objective: Stabilize the failing nebula by defeating the corrupted guardians and cleansing the Grand Celestial Engine
level.reward: The Stormcaller's Ascension mantle and control over the local timeline

level.setting: The derelict remnants of the Aetherial Observatory floating in deep space

pickup.name: Essence Lens
pickup.effect: Increases critical hit chance against shadowy entities

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Sentinel opens the blast doors to the nebula corridor.

encounters.hazard: Nebula gas that periodically obscures vision

pickup.name: Gravity Anchor
pickup.effect: Allows the player to root themselves firmly against knockback effects

encounters.trigger: Clearing the wraith destabilizes the floor, revealing the path to the Core Chamber.

encounters.hazard: Swirling stellar winds that push the player back

pickup.name: Celestial Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the shield generator of the final boss

encounters.trigger: Securing the key initiates the sequence to summon the Celestial Titan.

boss.name: Titan of the Lost Constellation
boss.victory_condition: Use the Celestial Key to bypass the Titan's shields and deliver the final blow.

level.objective: Restore the Aetherial Observatory to stabilize the surrounding star system.

level.setting: A decaying orrery floating in the center of a dying nebula, where gravity is fractured and stars scream silently.

enemy.name: Clockwork Wraith
enemy.weakness: Aether-Conductive Wrench strikes on glowing joints

encounters.hazard: Shifting floor plates that eject the player into the void upon contact.

pickup.name: Stardust Flux Capacitor
pickup.effect: Temporarily freezes mechanical enemies in place.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Wraith releases the locking mechanism for the bridge to the Astral Observatory.

encounters.hazard: Zero-gravity zones that make movement sluggish and unpredictable.

pickup.name: Celestial Lens
pickup.effect: Reveals the true physical form of incorporeal entities.

encounters.trigger: The Stalker's death ignites the beacon, drawing the attention of the Void Warden.

encounters.hazard: Periodic black hole pulses that pull the player toward the edge of the map.

pickup.name: Singularity Core
pickup.effect: Overcharges the player's weapon to deal triple damage.

encounters.trigger: Claiming the Singularity Core forces the boss to manifest.

boss.name: Void Warden Malakor
boss.victory_condition: Stabilize the core inside the Warden's armor plates while his shield is down.

level.objective: Repair the cosmic Orrery before the nebula collapses and consumes all time.
level.reward: The Chronos Gear, a legendary artifact capable of rewinding the player's death once per encounter.

level.setting: A crumbling orbital research station drifting into a collapsing star

pickup.name: Ion Capacitor
pickup.effect: Increases electrical conductivity of tools

encounters.trigger: Entering the command deck triggers the secondary lock-down

pickup.name: Supercooled Liquid Nitrogen
pickup.effect: Freezes mechanical systems

encounters.trigger: Opening the airlock reveals the docking bay

pickup.name: Stellar Ignition Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the main fusion reactor

encounters.trigger: Inserting the Stellar Ignition Key activates the boss arena

boss.name: Solar Core Sentinel
boss.victory_condition: Overload the core while the boss is suppressed

level.objective: Stabilize the station's orbit before the star swallows it
